OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Carol Rohan.
Attorney Daniel Stern for the plaintiff.
Defendants Roger Burgos and Felipe Caamal Burgos are not present.
Spanish Court Interpreter Karina McMillan-Rea is present and released.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of March 27, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
